title: wedelia uniflora
intro: Wedelia uniflora, also known as the flowering spilanthes or goat's head, is a plant species within the sunflower family that is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Wedelia uniflora include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system, as well as its use in treating wounds and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, Wedelia uniflora is often made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
